# Security Policy

Quill-Sort is under active development and may contain bugs or security issues.

- If you discover a vulnerability or suspect a security issue:
  - **Do not** open a public GitHub issue with sensitive details.
  - Instead, GitHub DM @dragonbreathIT 
    with steps to reproduce and any relevant context.

I will review reports as soon as possible and work on a fix. Please give me a
reasonable amount of time to address the issue before public disclosure.
